    var ajax = new XMLHttpRequest();
    ajax.open('GET', "https://assets.quizlet.com/_next/static/media/icons.7932d1d4.svg");
    ajax.send();
    ajax.onload = function () {
      if (ajax.status === 404) {
        return Rollbar.error('Error fetching SVG sprite sheet (not found)');
      } else if (ajax.status !== 200) {
        // Sample these warnings, because errors spike when scraping traffic is happening.
        if (Math.random() <= WARNING_SAMPLE_RATE) {
          return Rollbar.warning('Error fetching SVG sprite sheet (bad response)', { code: ajax.status });
        }
      }
      var div = document.createElement('div');
      div.style.position = 'absolute';
      div.style.width = '0';
      div.style.height = '0';
      div.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      div.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      div.innerHTML = ajax.responseText;
      var waitForBody = setInterval(function() {
        if (document.body) {
          clearInterval(waitForBody);
          document.body.insertBefore(div, document.body.childNodes[0]);
        }
      }, 10);
    };

(function() {
  function setBodyThemeClass(theme) {
    document.body.className = document.body.className.replace(/theme-(default|night)/g, '');
    document.body.className += ' theme-' + theme;
  }
  if (typeof window.matchMedia === 'function') {
    var mql = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)');
    setBodyThemeClass(mql.matches ? 'night' : 'default');
  }
})();

class="Toastify"></div></div><script>(function(){
      function genEventId() {
        if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) {
          return crypto.randomUUID();
        }
        return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function (c) {
          var r = (Math.random() * 16) | 0;
          var v = c === 'x' ? r : (r & 0x3) | 0x8;
          return v.toString(16);
        });
      }
      function normalizeKetchConsentStatus(status) {
        return status === 'granted';
      }
      function readKetchConsentFromCookie() {
        var cookiePrefix = '_ketch_consent_v1_=';
        var cookies = document.cookie ? document.cookie.split('; ') : [];
        for (var i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
          if (cookies[i].indexOf(cookiePrefix) !== 0) continue;
          try {
            var cookieValue = decodeURIComponent(cookies[i].slice(cookiePrefix.length));
            var json = JSON.parse(atob(cookieValue));
            return {
              advertising_cookies: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
                json.advertising_cookies && json.advertising_cookies.status
              ),
              analytics: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
                json.analytics && json.analytics.status
              ),
            };
          } catch (e) {
            return { advertising_cookies: false, analytics: false };
          }
        }
        return { advertising_cookies: false, analytics: false };
      }
      function extractKetchConsentForDataLayer(consent) {
        var purposes = consent && (consent.purposes || consent);
        return {
          advertising_cookies: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
            purposes && purposes.advertising_cookies && purposes.advertising_cookies.status
          ),
          analytics: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
            purposes && purposes.analytics && purposes.analytics.status
          ),
        };
      }
      function registerKetchConsentListener() {
        if (typeof window.ketch !== 'function') return;
        window.ketch('on', 'consent', function(consent) {
          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          window.dataLayer.push(Object.assign(
            { event: 'ketch_consent_update' },
            extractKetchConsentForDataLayer(consent)
          ));
        });
      }
      var analyticsData = {"locale":"en-us","abTests":"EsStudyPathing[default,subscriptions]:control,GoogleFedCMFeatureFlag:fedCMOptIn,GroupOrdersImprovedLooseLink:experiment,LearningToRankBlendedSetV2[default,search]:control,MagicLinkOnUserConfirmation:experiment1,NewGroupPurchasePageFeatureFlag:experiment,QChatMeteringLongTerm[default,engagement,subscriptions,ads]:control,TestPaywallUI[default,subscriptions]:control,CopyABTestStudyModeNameQChatEXMKM:control","loginSource":"google","isLoggedIn":true,"selfIdentifiedUserType":"student","isTeacherSignUp":false,"userUpgradeType":"free","isVerifiedCreator":false,"renderEnvironment":"renderer","uid":"-5953756012608973344","userId":436570624,"canSendDataBasedOnAgeAndCountry":true,"countryCode":"at","regionCode":"at-9","isUnderAge":false,"isUnderEighteen":false,"isUnderSixteen":false,"isUnderThirteen":false,"firstName":"\u0639\u0644\u06cc","lastName":"\u0642\u0627\u0633\u0645\u06cc","phoneNumber":null,"isRetargetable":true,"daysSinceSignup":0,"customerEmail":"d5ed818015e5770bf62219916f04ac1a7db2706f2f5ea8e634c4e10b223528e0","email":"ali.gha3mi75@gmail.com","studyableTitle":"English Idioms in use advanced","studyableId":515682940,"studyableType":"set","hasDiagrams":false,"advertising_cookies":true,"analytics":true};
      Object.assign(analyticsData, readKetchConsentFromCookie());
      analyticsData.path = "Sets/show";
      analyticsData.event = 'dataLayer-initialized';
      analyticsData.event_id = genEventId();
      analyticsData.event_time = Date.now();
      var pageViewData = Object.assign({}, analyticsData, {

        event_id: genEventId(),
        event_time: Date.now(),
      });
      window.dataLayer = [analyticsData, pageViewData, {
        'gtm.start': Date.now(),
        event:'gtm.js'
      }];
      registerKetchConsentListener();
